SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLDIS, JOSEPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NAZ AUTO SERVICES, INC. BP AMERICA, INC JOSEPH, DEJUANA E. (THE EVIDENCE AND TESTIMONY SUBMITTED DID NOT ESTABLISH BY A PERPONDERENCE OF EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANTS OR THEIR EMPLOYEES CAUSED THE DAMAGE TO HIS VEHICLE. DEFENDENT BP AMERICA DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,913.68 FILED BY SOLDIS, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
